name: 甜蜜收束型（撒糖結局）
description: 大婚場景中帝后的俏皮互動作為全劇最後一個畫面，以輕鬆甜蜜收束整個虐戀故事，讓觀眾帶著幸福感離場。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: Since you are now my empress, you must protect me... Since you rescued me, you must take full responsibility for me. Gross.
